content.problemStatement:
**Scenario:**

You just finished building a small project called `Todo-App` on your laptop. \
You created an empty GitHub repository for it and connected your local project to it. \
Your branch is already renamed to `main`. \
Now you want your `Todo-App` files to appear on GitHub for the first time. 

**Question:**

1. Which command will upload your project to GitHub and set the upstream branch?
2. After the first push is done, which command will you use for all future pushes?
